title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively, claimed to be derived from studying Anthropic engineers' actual practices. The rules emphasize prompting for skills rather than direct tasks, composable skill-building, and incremental improvement across sessions.
